name: Object Store Adapter
purpose: Thin domain layer over Cloudflare R2 for note persistence.
responsibilities: Translate Note domain objects to and from R2 blobs
internalStructure: Adapter module with a single R2 client; pure functions for serialise / deserialise.

interfaces.name: putNote(note, expectedETag)
interfaces.description: Writes a note with optimistic concurrency.

interfaces.name: getNote(id)
interfaces.description: Reads the latest version of a note.
